name: In-Memory Trigram Lexical Index
description: Trigram/BM25 lexical search index (pure-TS, no native SQLite dep). Salvaged from continue's FullTextSearchCodebaseIndex (P-codeintel-7): FTS5 tokenize='trigram' + BM25 ranking + pathWeightMultiplier (10x). The lexical pillar of hybrid retrieval fusion (25% weight per P-codeintel-9). Works everywhere + is fully testable.
